# 搜狗搜索文章链接转永久链接

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/sougou_dn9a:
    post:
      summary: 搜狗搜索文章链接转永久链接
      deprecated: false
      description: >-
        |                 状态码                 |                       
        说明                         |

        |:-----------------------------------:|:-------------------------------------------------:|

        | {"message":"Internal Server Error"} |                  
        网络错误，请重试1~3次                    |

        |                  0                  |                       
        成功                         |

        |                 -1                  |            
        QPS超过上限，不得高于1次/秒，请5秒后再试！              |

        |                 104                 |                 
        短连接文章已被删除或文章被迁移                  |

        |                 106                 |              
        获取阅读点赞数频率过快，请暂停2秒后重试!               |

        |                 400                 |         短链接转化失败，建议先调用 短链接转长链接
        转化为长链接后继续调用         |

        |                10002                |                   
        key或附加码不正确                     |

        |                20001                |                    
        金额不足，请充值                      |

        |                20002                |                   
        请输入正确的微信链接                     |

        |                20003                | 文章链接有误，请检查文章链接url中的&是否已经编码为%26  
        \|50000\|内部服务器错误 |



        ### 返回结果

        | 字段 | 说明 |

        | --- | --- |

        | ['data']['ori_link'] | 搜狗临时链接 |

        | ['data']['permanent_link'] | 文章永久链接 |
      tags: []
      parameters:
        - name: url
          in: query
          description: 搜狗临时链接(0.02元/次)
          required: false
          example: >-
            dn9a_-gY295K0Rci_xozVXfdMkSQTLW6cwJThYulHEtVjXrGTiVgS0Jq9Gd-AomY8bGQ72zu4zmkao_o0O-Q5VqXa8Fplpd9aDu_G563zqSdNRCntLB-mI_-ghk7qtCtd4baRlvumkmbbx68qDX9OAviqyMhuUv2VkWFsmcopVVIkeeItjjtgbrhDME6zss0Te18xB-jrojoLL04JBzq0IACC4pfWcq_WhzBk5qss9z5dqKnywje3L2HoOafs79oQhE90RbrRJ5OJBjQH7pCxQ..
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: key
          in: query
          description: 极致了官网 key
          required: false
          example: '{{key}}'
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: verifycode
          in: query
          description: 附加码，如设置了附加码verifycode，则此参数为必选，如未设置则为非必选
          required: false
          example: ''
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: type
          in: query
          description: ''
          required: false
          example: '2'
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: query
          in: query
          description: ''
          required: false
          example: '%E5%AF%B9%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87'
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: token
          in: query
          description: ''
          required: false
          example: DA8A1D91D18B46C41B1D5EA2A7FC65621BCC3E69693B8B5F
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: k
          in: query
          description: ''
          required: false
          example: '44'
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: h
          in: query
          description: ''
          required: false
          example: b",     "key":"{{key}}" }
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                url:
                  type: string
                  description: 搜狗临时链接(0.1元/次)
                verifycode:
                  type: string
                  description: 附加码，如设置了附加码verifycode，则此参数为必选，如未设置则为非必选
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: 极致了官网 key
              x-apifox-orders:
                - url
                - key
                - verifycode
              required:
                - url
                - key
                - verifycode
            example:
              url: >-
                https://weixin.sogou.com/link?url=dn9a_-gY295K0Rci_xozVXfdMkSQTLW6cwJThYulHEtVjXrGTiVgS0Jq9Gd-AomY8bGQ72zu4zmkao_o0O-Q5VqXa8Fplpd9aDu_G563zqSdNRCntLB-mI_-ghk7qtCtd4baRlvumkmbbx68qDX9OAviqyMhuUv2VkWFsmcopVVIkeeItjjtgbrhDME6zss0Te18xB-jrojoLL04JBzq0IACC4pfWcq_WhzBk5qss9z5dqKnywje3L2HoOafs79oQhE90RbrRJ5OJBjQH7pCxQ..&type=2&query=%E5%AF%B9%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87&token=[REDACTED]&k=44&h=b
              key: '{{key}}'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  code:
                    type: integer
                  msg:
                    type: string
                  data:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      ori_link:
                        type: string
                        description: 搜狗临时链接
                      permanent_link:
                        type: string
                        description: 文章永久链接
                    required:
                      - ori_link
                      - permanent_link
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - ori_link
                      - permanent_link
                required:
                  - code
                  - msg
                  - data
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - code
                  - msg
                  - data
              example:
                code: 0
                msg: 成功
                data:
                  ori_link: >-
                    https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?src=11&timestamp=1722419581&ver=5416&signature=BRw6vhlgLLfNpN1lpSrT1n3OzxfdgoFLVR4D-bwDGlU0f7ES-16ciAmEksjVIvGTqGEUodD3ssx-CxRYR726Zm304nlQC2juv1l64JjMc41MnIhpoYaItHAaaKt*Z1cJ&new=1
                  permanent_link: >-
                    https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzkxNjMwMzM2Mw==&mid=2247483728&idx=1&sn=d8fab215abb915361143c031d9ae50ed#rd
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: ''
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-390256751-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
